case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. EFRAIN RAMIREZ MORALES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, EFRAIN RAMIREZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED NOV-04-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, EFRAIN RAMIREZ
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT EFRAIN RAMIREZ MORALES IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
